_comment: PLACEHOLDER / SCHEMA EXAMPLE. The real file is (re)written by voices/generate_voices.py::run_batch on a GPU host. Each `voices.<id>` entry is {description, sample_line, ref_clip, clone_prompt_path, sample_rate, clone_prompt}. `clone_prompt` is null because the actual prompt is an opaque tensor blob stored out-of-line at `clone_prompt_path` (load via torch.load). `ref_clip` and `clone_prompt_path` are paths RELATIVE to the voices/ dir. Consumer handoff: see voices/README.md.

gm_narrator.description: A warm, theatrical storyteller and Game Master — rich mid-range, inviting and slightly wry, with confident dramatic timing. The default voice for all narration.
gm_narrator.sample_line: The rusted gate groans open, and beyond it the wasteland stretches out under a bruised and radiant sky. Roll for initiative, wanderers.
